title: North America Clean Fuels Market Monthly Review: July 2025
content: CA LCFS average Type 1 monthly credit price rose by 5.97% month-over-month (MoM) in July. Monthly credit transactions increased by 9.73% MoM in July. RIN generation increased by 97.50% in June. A total of 6.27 B RINs were transacted in June, 35.99% less than May. In June, OR CFP average credit prices decreased by 12.43% compared to May. OR CFP trading activity witnessed a 30.80% fall in June. BC LCFS monthly trading volumes rose to 122.83 K credits in June from 116.30 K credits in May. In May, BC LCFS credit prices rose by 13.30% month-over-month.
author: Aru Somya
